page_content:
FREN269 Special Topics in Study Abroad II (1-6 Credits)

Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

FREN298 Aspects of French Civilization (3 Credits)

Topic to be determined each semester. Historical or thematic approaches to French art, literature, and culture. Taught in English.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Additional Information: Credit may not be applied to French major.
